boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

network.title: Connection problem
network.description: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
network.timeout: Request timeout — please try again in a moment

unauthorized.title: Session expired
unauthorized.description: Please sign in again to continue.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to view this page.

server.title: Server error
server.description: Something went wrong on our end. We're looking into it.
server.tryAgainLater: Try again in a few minutes

validation.title: Invalid input
validation.description: Please review the highlighted fields and try again.

generic.contactSupport: If this keeps happening, contact support at {email}
